mutation: Moved ambiguous trigger words (one-pager, report, brochure, guide, summary, brief, overview) from doc trigger column to explicit Ambiguous trigger words section. Changed doc trigger to 'document' only (unambiguous). Renamed table header to 'Clear triggers'.
Qualified social triggers to phrase-level specificity: 'social card', 'social banner', 'OG image', 'LinkedIn banner', 'Twitter card'. Moved bare 'banner' and 'card' to ambiguous list.

Consolidated doc+html conditional load from two separate lines into one rule: 'output = doc OR html → Read html.md now. (Load once.)' with explicit branching note for each subtype. Prevents double-loading confusion.
Added 'or two clear trigger types fire simultaneously' to clarifying question condition. Handles overlap edge case (e.g. 'landing page with slide deck section' fires both component and slide).

Animation gate now explicitly excludes slide output type from top-level pf-motion.md load. Rewritten as 'If the output type is NOT slide AND user mentions animation...'. Exception note clarified: 'Do not load pf-motion.md here for slide output — it will be double-loaded.'
Removed duplicate 'Do not guess' at end of clarifying question sentence (was present in both the ambiguous-trigger note and the clarifying question line).
Added 'in order' to mandatory load instruction: 'Read these two files now, in order.' Makes sequential loading explicit.
Reviewed html trigger list for ambiguity (comparison, etc.). 'option comparison' is a two-word clear trigger — plain 'comparison' falls through to ambiguous correctly. No change needed.
Verified clarifying question phrasing 'social card or banner' is consistent with ambiguous trigger list. No regression. No change.
Verified 'interactive document' routes correctly via html triggers. 'document with charts' routes via doc+charts gate. No gaps found. Stopping — plateau 5, score at ceiling.
